interactive editor for VLSI layouts that runs under 4.3 BSD Unix, as well as derivatives such as Digital's Ultrix and Sun's Sun OS. " More information about Magic can be found at the Magic homepage and on the Magic (software) wiki page. You may also

d on the Magic (software) wiki page. You may also be interested in Spice . Magic is covered by the following Software Agreement . The ILP Description includes a more complete description of the package. Tapes and docs are no longer available. Please
